headline: Nvidia Stock Notches a Record. What Can Give It Another Boost.
summary: Nvidia  stock logged its third record close of the year Monday as investor enthusiasm over the chip sector spilled over to the relative laggard of the bunch.  Nvidia has risen 13% and added roughly $550 billion in market capitalization over that four-day streak.  For reference, only 18 U.S. companies, including Nvidia itself, have a market cap greater than $550 billion.

headline: Rackspace Technology (RXT) Extends Rally as Short Covering Accelerates Gains
summary: Rackspace Technology (NASDAQ:RXT) shares climbed as much as 10% on Monday morning, continuing the strong momentum seen after last week’s explosive rally. The stock surged 56% on Friday and has now gained more than 200% since the company released earnings and announced a strategic partnership with AMD on May 7.

headline: Nvidia Stock Heads for Record. What Can Give It Another Boost.
summary: Nvidia  stock was gaining early Monday.  The chip maker was headed for a record close and its earnings could provide more momentum.  While Nvidia is still the leading artificial-intelligence chip company, its 15% stock gain this year so far through Friday’s close has lagged far behind semiconductor peers  Intel  and  Advanced Micro Devices  which have gained on excitement about the uses of their central-processing units for AI inference.

headline: This Week In AI Chips - NVIDIA Strengthens Board with Strategic Leadership Addition
summary: NVIDIA has announced the addition of Suzanne Nora Johnson to its board of directors, effective July 13, 2026. Her extensive leadership experience across finance, technology, and healthcare is anticipated to provide significant strategic insights for NVIDIA as it continues its advancements in AI and accelerated computing. Johnson's previous roles at Goldman Sachs and current board positions emphasize her expertise and potential contribution to NVIDIA's efforts in shaping the future of AI...
